summary: Amendment No. 2 plan r1 (non-authoring). All cited line numbers in the current 211-line constitution + external sources verified TRUE; DMC-T020 free; 2-grant scope correct (constitution is NOT a landmark â€” no landmark_authorized needed); codex-line 3â†’4 claim consistent; VII.1/VII.3/VII.4 compliance met. NEEDS_CLARIFICATION on two constitutional-consistency blockers: B1 â€” the proposed VIII.2 entrenches the 5-stage loop shorthand (planâ†’scopeâ†’executeâ†’verifyâ†’evidence) OMITTING the critic stage that III.1 (:88-90) and DMC.md:26-41 canonically include; entrenching a critic-less loop as THE essence risks canonizing the weaker form and, via VII.2's effect-clause, colliding with the protected non-authoring-critic requirement â€” VIII.2 must carry the 6-stage form (planâ†’criticâ†’scopeâ†’executeâ†’verifyâ†’evidence) or explicitly preserve the critic stage. B2 â€” VIII.3(a)'s absolute 'masking a red check' prohibition sweeps in acts Article V explicitly PERMITS (V.2/V.3 authorized G4 overrides, V.6 mode hatch) and the disclosed III.4 advisory-replay carve-out + V.5 known-baseline handling â€” an intra-constitutional contradiction; VIII.3(a) must forbid UNAUTHORIZED/undisclosed masking only and defer to Art. V + III.4. Advisories: A1 as-fixes scoping for VIII.3(b); A2 TODO ban right-scoped to committed source surfaces (exempt .harness/** machinery + scratch); A3 GATE-DECISION â€” VIII.4 names AUTONOMY.md stop-conditions as BINDING (recommend yes, schema-backed); A4 VIII.3e framed as lockstep-parity, no tier claim (forbidden-lexeme grep is the only automated gate; ADVISORY framing is executor self-discipline); A5 GATE-DECISION â€” VI.1 touch include-vs-drop must be human-ratified, not critic/executor discretion (recommend INCLUDE); A6 VIII.5 behavior-preservation qualified to where a suite exists; A7 verifier lane independence for T020.5/.6 (fresh context, verifier captures the VII.4 evidence).

blockers.statement: VIII.2 entrenches the critic-less 5-stage loop shorthand as THE essence, contradicting III.1's canonical 6-stage loop (planâ†’criticâ†’scopeâ†’executeâ†’verifyâ†’evidence) and risking â€” via VII.2's effect-clause â€” the protected non-authoring-critic requirement.
blockers.suggested_fix: VIII.2 uses the 6-stage form including the critic stage, or explicitly declares the 5-stage a shorthand that preserves III.2 stage-(2) non-authoring critic as inviolable. Falsifiable at read time: the critic stage must be present/preserved in the final VIII.2 text.

blockers.statement: VIII.3(a)'s unqualified 'masking a red check' prohibition forbids acts Article V explicitly permits (authorized G4 overrides, mode hatch) and the disclosed III.4 advisory-replay carve-out + V.5 known-baseline handling â€” intra-constitutional contradiction; Art. V is NOT VII.2-protected so VIII would silently override it.
blockers.suggested_fix: VIII.3(a) forbids UNAUTHORIZED/undisclosed masking only, explicitly deferring to Article V's bounded escape hatches (V.2/V.3, V.6) and III.4/V.5's disclosed known-baseline handling. Falsifiable: VIII.3(a) text names/defers to the Art. V + III.4 exceptions.

advisories.statement: VIII.3(b) must carry the 'forbidden as FIXES' qualifier in the article text so exploratory/scouting/spike work is not caught.
VIII.3(d) TODO ban right-scoped to repo-committed shipped/source surfaces; exempt .harness/** run machinery, scratchpad, exploratory analysis.
GATE-DECISION: VIII.4 names AUTONOMY.md stop-conditions (:43-58, schema-mirrored) as BINDING â€” recommend yes; BIND, don't restate.

VIII.3e framed as lockstep-parity obligation (III.3-style), no enforcement-tier claim about the Codex host; forbidden-lexeme-free is the only automated gate â€” ADVISORY framing is executor self-discipline.
GATE-DECISION: VI.1 touch include-vs-drop is a substantive governance-supremacy decision for the HUMAN gate (recommend INCLUDE), not critic/executor discretion.
VIII.5 behavior-preservation proof qualified to 'where a machine suite exists'; docs governance uses the --all-SKIP precedent; byte-frozen surfaces excluded (refactor forbidden outright).
T020.5/.6 run as an independent fresh-context verifier lane; the VERIFIER (not the author) captures the VII.4 lexeme evidence.
